title: Trump says U.S. will 'free' ships trapped in Persian Gulf by Strait of Hormuz closure
summary: Trump announced U.S. efforts to free vessels trapped by the multi-month Strait of Hormuz closure, which has severely disrupted global supply chains. The blockade has constrained oil shipments and maritime commerce between major trading partners. Reopening the strait is essential for restoring energy and goods flows.
content: Vessels have been largely unable to pass through the Strait of Hormuz for months, disrupting key supply chains.

zh.title: 特朗普表示美国将"解救"因霍尔木兹海峡关闭而困于波斯湾的船只
zh.summary: 特朗普宣布美国将努力解救因数月霍尔木兹海峡关闭而被困的船只，该关闭严重扰乱了全球供应链。该关闭限制了主要贸易伙伴间的石油运输和海上贸易。重新开放该海峡对恢复能源和商品流量至关重要。

title: Stock futures are little changed as investors monitor latest in U.S.-Iran developments: Live updates
summary: Stock futures showed minimal movement as investors closely tracked U.S.-Iran geopolitical developments. The S&P 500 and Nasdaq both hit record highs Friday, reflecting recent market momentum and investor confidence. Cautious trading suggests investors are awaiting clarity on escalating tensions.
content: The S&P 500 and Nasdaq Composite are coming off of a solid week, having notched fresh records on Friday.

zh.title: 投资者密切关注美国-伊朗最新动态，股指期货基本持平：实时更新
zh.summary: 股指期货变动微乎其微，投资者密切关注美国-伊朗地缘政治动态。标准普尔500指数和纳斯达克指数周五创新高，反映了最近的市场势头和投资者信心。谨慎交易表明投资者在等待关于紧张局势升级的明确信息。

title: Amsterdam bans public adverts for meat and fossil fuels
summary: Amsterdam has prohibited public advertisements for meat and fossil fuels to align with its environmental sustainability goals. The policy reflects the city's commitment to reducing carbon emissions and climate impact. The ban could serve as a model for other cities pursuing aggressive climate targets.
content: Local politicians say the move is in line with the Dutch capital's environmental targets.

zh.title: 阿姆斯特丹禁止肉类和化石燃料公共广告
zh.summary: 阿姆斯特丹已禁止肉类和化石燃料的公共广告，以符合其环保可持续目标。该政策反映了该市致力于减少碳排放和应对气候变化的承诺。该禁令可能成为其他城市追求激进气候目标的典范。

title: The threat to summer holidays looming from jet fuel shortages
summary: Jet fuel shortages pose a significant threat to summer travel plans and tourism globally. Supply disruptions could limit flight availability during peak vacation season and raise travel costs. Industry and government solutions are being explored to mitigate potential widespread travel disruptions.
content: What impact might shortages have on our summer holidays - and what could be done about it?

zh.title: 喷气燃料短缺对暑假构成的威胁
zh.summary: 喷气燃料短缺对全球夏季旅游计划构成重大威胁。供应中断可能限制旅游旺季的航班可用性并提高旅行成本。业界和政府正在探索解决方案，以减轻潜在的广泛旅行中断。

title: Here’s what’s worth streaming in May 2026 on Netflix, Hulu, HBO Max and more
summary: Major streaming platforms are launching new content in May 2026, including Netflix's "Lord of the Flies," Apple's "Star City," and the return of Hulu's "Deli Boys."
content: Netflix’s ‘Lord of the Flies,’ Apple’s ‘Star City’ and the return of Hulu’s ‘Deli Boys’ are among the highlights of the coming month

zh.title: 2026年5月Netflix、Hulu、HBO Max等平台值得观看的内容
zh.summary: 主要流媒体平台在2026年5月推出新内容，包括Netflix的《蛮荒求生》、Apple的《星城》以及Hulu《熟食男孩》的回归。

title: Big Tech earnings show how big, smart spending can be rewarded by the market
summary: Large technology companies' latest earnings reports demonstrate that substantial, strategic investments in AI and infrastructure yield strong market rewards. Strong results contradict previous concerns about unsustainable tech spending bubbles. The performance validates investor confidence in major tech firms' growth strategies.
content: It's obvious from this quarter that the bubble talk has been proven wrong.

zh.title: 大型科技公司业绩显示聪明支出如何获得市场回报
zh.summary: 大型科技公司最新财报表明，对人工智能和基础设施的重大战略投资能够产生强劲的市场回报。强劲业绩与之前关于不可持续科技支出泡沫的担忧相悖。该表现验证了投资者对主要科技公司增长战略的信心。

title: OPEC+ announces modest boost in oil production. But here’s why it’s a mostly symbolic move.
summary: OPEC+ announced a modest production increase for June, though analysts describe the move as largely symbolic given market constraints. The ongoing conflict with Iran continues to significantly constrain global oil supplies and market balance. The modest boost is insufficient to address supply disruptions from geopolitical tensions.
content: In a largely symbolic move, the OPEC+ nations announced Sunday that they would slightly increase crude production in June, as the war with Iran continues to stifle the world’s supply of oil.

zh.title: 欧佩克+宣布小幅提高石油产量，但为什么这主要是象征性举措
zh.summary: 欧佩克+宣布6月产量小幅增加，但分析人士称这一举措主要是象征性的，因为市场面临约束。伊朗方面的持续冲突继续严重制约全球石油供应和市场平衡。这一小幅提升不足以应对地缘政治紧张造成的供应中断。

title: Iran says it has received U.S. response to its latest offer for peace talks
summary: Iran and the U.S. continue nuclear negotiations despite ongoing tensions, with no indication the conflict is moving toward resolution. The dispute continues to disrupt global energy supplies and create economic headwinds for international markets.
content: The U.S. and Iran appear no closer to ending a war that has disrupted energy supplies, roiled world markets and raised fears about a global economic downturn.

zh.title: 伊朗称已收到美国对其最新和平谈判提议的回应
zh.summary: 伊朗和美国继续核谈判，尽管持续存在紧张局势，但没有迹象表明冲突正朝着解决方向发展。这场争端继续扰乱全球能源供应，为国际市场制造经济逆风。

title: Greg Abel earns solid scorecard from Berkshire shareholders after first annual meeting
summary: Greg Abel received positive reviews from Berkshire Hathaway shareholders at his inaugural annual meeting, validating his leadership transition. The positive reception comes despite the notable absence of legendary founder Warren Buffett.
content: The reviews from longtime shareholders and professional investors were broadly positive, even as many acknowledged the notable absence of Warren Buffett,

zh.title: 格雷格·阿贝尔在首次年度股东大会后获得伯克希尔股东的好评
zh.summary: 格雷格·阿贝尔在伯克希尔·哈撒韦公司的首次年度股东大会上获得了股东的正面评价，验证了他的领导权交接。尽管传奇创始人沃伦·巴菲特明显缺席，但股东的反应仍然是积极的。

title: Pirro reveals new Trump attack evidence; Cole Allen challenges 'suicide precautions'
summary: U.S. Attorney Jeanine Pirro disclosed new details about a Trump-related incident, revealing which bullet struck an agent—a disclosure prosecutors had previously withheld. The revelation challenges earlier claims about security protocols in the incident.
content: Until U.S. Attorney Jeanine Pirro's comments, prosecutors had not disclosed whose bullet hit the agent.

zh.title: 皮罗披露特朗普袭击事件新证据；科尔·艾伦质疑"自杀防范措施"
zh.summary: 美国检察官珍妮娜·皮罗披露了特朗普相关事件的新细节，透露了哪发子弹击中了特工——这是检察官之前隐瞒的披露。该揭露质疑了该事件中关于安全协议的早期声称。

title: The market is riding high on an AI spending boom — but what could crack this rally?
summary: Stock market gains have been driven primarily by concentrated artificial intelligence spending and Big Tech company earnings in Q1. This concentration of gains raises questions about the sustainability and breadth of the current rally.
content: Earnings have dazzled in Q1, but continued upward revisions to 2026 outlooks have been highly concentrated.

zh.title: 市场因AI支出繁荣而高涨——但什么会打破这种涨势?
zh.summary: 股市涨幅主要由集中的人工智能支出和科技巨头第一季度的收益推动。收益的这种集中性提出了关于当前涨势的可持续性和广度的问题。

title: Pirro appears to drop plans to appeal criminal investigation of Fed Chair Powell
summary: U.S. Attorney Jeanine Pirro has shifted her legal strategy in the investigation of Federal Reserve Chairman Jerome Powell, potentially abandoning planned appeals. The strategic change comes just before a critical deadline.
content: The U.S. attorney shifted legal strategies in her investigation of Federal Reserve Chairman Jerome Powell just ahead of a deadline.

zh.title: Pirro似乎放弃对美联储主席鲍威尔刑事调查的上诉计划
zh.summary: 美国检察官珍妮·皮罗在对美联储主席杰罗姆·鲍威尔的调查中改变了法律策略，可能放弃了计划中的上诉。这一战略改变发生在关键截止日期前夕。

title: Here are the 3 big things we're watching in the stock market in the week ahead
summary: The upcoming week will feature significant market-moving events including earnings reports from major companies, Corning's investor day, and fresh employment data. These developments could substantially impact market sentiment and equity valuations.
content: A trio of Club holdings report earnings. Plus, there is Corning's investor day and a fresh batch of jobs data.

zh.title: 以下是我们在下周股市中关注的3件大事
zh.summary: 即将到来的一周将包括来自主要公司的收益报告、康宁投资者日和新的就业数据等重大市场驱动事件。这些发展可能会实质性地影响市场情绪和股票估值。

title: ‘I’m not interested in long-term care insurance’: I’d like to retire at 55. How much will I have to pay for healthcare?
summary: An early retirement aspirant considering retiring at 55 faces significant uncertainty about healthcare costs without long-term care insurance. Medical expenses represent a major financial consideration for those planning to leave the workforce early.
content: “The only thing holding me back is worrying about medical costs.”

zh.title: "我对长期护理保险不感兴趣"：我想在55岁退休。医疗保健需要花多少钱？
zh.summary: 一位希望在55岁退休的早期退休申请者面临关于不购买长期护理保险的医疗费用的重大不确定性。医疗费用是那些计划提前离开劳动力队伍的人需要考虑的主要财务问题。

title: Healthcare cost surge makes parental paid leave benefits a target for workplace cuts
summary: Rising healthcare costs are prompting major companies like Zoom and Deloitte to eliminate generous paid parental leave benefits as part of broader cost-cutting measures. This trend threatens family-friendly workplace policies as healthcare expenses continue escalating.
content: As healthcare costs soar and companies search for savings, generous paid parental leave is a benefit being cut, with recent examples from Zoom and Deloitte.

zh.title: 医疗保健成本激增导致带薪育儿假福利成为工作场所削减的目标
zh.summary: 医疗保健成本上升促使Zoom和德勤等主要公司消除慷慨的带薪育儿假福利，作为更广泛的成本削减措施的一部分。随着医疗保健支出继续升级，这一趋势威胁到对家庭友好的工作场所政策。

title: S&P 500 profits haven’t been this rich in at least 15 years — but there’s more to the story
summary: S&P 500 profit margins have reached their highest level in at least 15 years, but much of this growth is concentrated in just three major technology companies. The concentration of gains masks significant risk and raises questions about broader market health.
content: Three Big Tech companies have had an outsize impact on first-quarter profit performance.

zh.title: 标普500指数利润至少15年来从未如此丰厚——但故事还有更多
zh.summary: 标普500指数的利润率达到了至少15年来的最高水平，但大部分增长集中在仅仅三家主要科技公司中。收益的集中掩盖了重大风险，并引发了对更广泛市场健康状况的质疑。

title: Used EV sales are surging — how their ownership costs compare to gas-powered cars
summary: Used electric vehicle sales are accelerating as more affordable options enter the secondary market, though buyers need to understand cost structures that differ from gasoline vehicles. This trend is making EV ownership more accessible to mainstream consumers.
content: With more affordable electric vehicles hitting used-car lots, buyers should be aware of some ownership costs that may differ from those that come with gas cars.

zh.title: 二手电动车销售激增——其所有权成本与汽油车的对比
zh.summary: 随着更多价格合理的车型进入二手市场，二手电动车销售正在加速。虽然购买者需要了解与汽油车不同的成本结构，但这一趋势正在使电动车所有权对主流消费者更容易获得。

title: ‘I am her scapegoat’: My mother-in-law squandered all her money. Do we buy her a house so she’s not homeless?
summary: A family struggles with the financial and emotional responsibility of potentially buying a house for a mother-in-law who mismanaged her savings. Family dynamics and blame complicated the decision about providing housing assistance.
content: “She blames me for her poor relationship with her son and grandchildren.”

zh.title: "我是她的替罪羊"：我的婆婆花光了所有钱。我们应该给她买房子以避免她无家可归吗？
zh.summary: 一个家庭在潜在为管理不善储蓄的婆婆购买房屋的财务和情感责任上苦恼。家庭动态和责任指责使提供住房援助的决定变得复杂化。

title: Fewer features, more value: Why some Americans are buying simpler cars
summary: Consumers are increasingly choosing simpler vehicles with manual controls, cloth seats, and analog gauges to achieve target prices around $30,000. This shift reflects growing consumer preference for affordability and value over advanced features.
content: Cloth seats, manual controls and analog gauges are back as buyers look for cars with sticker prices closer to $30,000.

zh.title: 功能较少，价值更高：为什么一些美国人在购买更简洁的汽车
zh.summary: 消费者越来越多地选择具有手动控制、布座椅和模拟仪表的更简洁的车辆，以实现约30,000美元的目标价格。这一转变反映了消费者对可负担性和价值而非高级功能的偏好不断增长。

title: ‘I hope to retire early’: I’m 56 and have 80% in a traditional IRA and 20% in a Roth. Am I in trouble?
summary: A 56-year-old with $3.5 million in savings seeks early retirement advice, with the majority in tax-deferred traditional retirement accounts. The article addresses concerns about account allocation and tax implications for early retirees. This reflects broader questions among high-net-worth individuals about optimizing retirement account strategy.
content: “We have $3.5 million in savings — $2.5 million of which are in retirement accounts.”

zh.title: "我希望早日退休"：我56岁，传统IRA占80%，罗斯占20%。我陷入困境了吗？
zh.summary: 一位拥有350万美元储蓄的56岁人士寻求早期退休建议，其中大部分存放在税收递延的传统退休账户中。文章探讨了提前退休者对账户配置和税收影响的关切。这反映了高净值人士对优化退休账户策略的广泛思考。

title: In five charts: How UAE's exit could affect Opec's influence over the oil price
summary: The UAE's potential departure from OPEC could significantly diminish the cartel's ability to influence global oil prices and manage production strategy. This analysis examines the broader geopolitical and economic implications of this major structural change.
content: The BBC takes a look in charts at what the UAE's departure could mean for the oil cartel and more widely.

zh.title: 五张图表：阿联酋退出OPEC如何影响欧佩克对油价的影响力
zh.summary: 阿联酋可能退出欧佩克将大大削弱该卡特尔影响全球油价和管理生产战略的能力。本分析研究了这一重大结构性变化的更广泛地缘政治和经济影响。

title: OPEC+ announces 188,000 barrels-per-day output increase in first meeting without UAE
summary: OPEC+ approved a 188,000 barrels-per-day production increase in its first meeting following the UAE's unexpected departure from the cartel. The decision demonstrates the group's ability to coordinate policy despite recent membership losses. The move signals OPEC+ is adjusting to reduced membership while maintaining production management.
content: Concerns around production were amplified further last week with news of the UAE's shock departure.

zh.title: OPEC+在阿联酋离开后首次会议中宣布日产量增加188,000桶
zh.summary: OPEC+在阿联酋意外离开卡特尔后的首次会议中批准了日产量增加188,000桶。该决定表明该组织尽管近期失去了成员国，仍具有协调政策的能力。此举表明OPEC+正在调整以应对成员减少，同时维持产量管理。

title: Top Wall Street analysts like these 3 stocks for their long-term prospects
summary: Wall Street analysts have identified three stocks positioned for long-term growth based on fundamental and technical analysis. These picks reflect analyst conviction about sector trends and company competitive positioning. Analyst recommendations influence institutional investment flows and market valuations across sectors.
content: The recommendations and analysis of these Wall Street experts can provide useful insights for stock selection.

zh.title: 华尔街顶级分析师看好这3只股票的长期前景
zh.summary: 华尔街分析师根据基本面和技术面分析，确定了三只具有长期增长潜力的股票。这些选择反映了分析师对行业趋势和公司竞争力的信念。分析师建议影响着机构投资流和跨部门的市场估值。

title: Chinese stocks are about to get a big AI boost, Morgan Stanley predicts
summary: Morgan Stanley predicts Chinese stocks will benefit significantly from expanding artificial intelligence development and adoption. The bank raised price targets on Chinese AI model developers, reflecting optimism about sector growth. The outlook highlights AI's central role in Chinese equities and appeals to global growth investors.
content: The investment bank also raised its price targets on two Chinese companies that develop artificial intelligence models.

zh.title: 摩根士丹利预测：中国股票将迎来人工智能重大提振
zh.summary: 摩根士丹利预测，随着人工智能的开发和应用不断扩展，中国股票将大幅受益。该行上调了中国AI模型开发商的价格目标，反映出对该行业增长的乐观预期。这一前景凸显了AI在中国股市中的核心地位，对全球增长投资者极具吸引力。

title: Earnings playbook: Palantir and Advanced Micro Devices usher in the next week of reports
summary: Major corporations including Palantir, AMD, Disney, and McDonald's will report quarterly earnings this week, providing crucial insight into corporate profitability and consumer spending across sectors. Results will help investors assess economic health and company performance guidance. Earnings reports typically drive significant market volatility and valuation adjustments.
content: Palantir, Advanced Micro Devices, Walt Disney and McDonald's are among the companies set to report.

zh.title: 财报时刻：Palantir和AMD领衔下周财报周期
zh.summary: 包括Palantir、AMD、迪士尼和麦当劳在内的大型企业将于本周公布季度财报，提供企业盈利能力和跨行业消费支出的关键洞察。这些结果将帮助投资者评估经济健康状况和企业前景指导。财报通常会引发显著的市场波动和估值调整。

title: U.S. crude oil exports surge to record as tankers flock to Gulf Coast during Iran war
summary: U.S. crude oil exports have hit record levels as Middle East supply disruptions from the Iran war drive global demand for American energy. The surge reflects both geopolitical tensions and the U.S. strategic advantage in oil markets. Export growth provides economic benefits through increased energy sector revenues.
content: Oil exports are booming from the U.S. Gulf Coast thanks to the Middle East supply disruption caused by the Iran war.

zh.title: 伊朗战争期间美国原油出口创纪录新高，油轮纷纷涌向海湾沿岸
zh.summary: 由于伊朗战争引发的中东供应中断推动全球对美国能源的需求，美国原油出口创历史新高。这一激增既反映了地缘政治紧张局势，也体现了美国在石油市场上的战略优势。出口增长通过能源行业收入增加为经济带来效益。

title: Greg Abel rules out Berkshire break-up, stresses continuity with Buffett's legacy at annual meeting
summary: Berkshire Hathaway's new CEO Greg Abel confirmed the company will not be broken up and pledged continuity with Warren Buffett's investment philosophy. Abel's first shareholder meeting as CEO emphasized commitment to the conglomerate structure and long-term value creation. The statement reassures investors about strategic direction after leadership transition.
content: New CEO Greg Abel did most of the talking at his first Berkshire Hathaway shareholders meeting, but Warren Buffett was still a major presence.

zh.title: Greg Abel排除伯克希尔分拆,强调与巴菲特遗产的连续性
zh.summary: 伯克希尔哈撒韦公司新任首席执行官格雷格·亚伯尔确认公司不会被分拆,承诺继续遵循沃伦·巴菲特的投资理念。亚伯尔在担任首席执行官后的首次股东大会上强调了对联合企业结构和长期价值创造的承诺。这份声明向投资者保证了领导层过渡后的战略方向。

title: Voters will judge Trump on the economy - how is it doing?
summary: As voters prepare for elections, economic conditions—particularly cost of living—will significantly influence electoral outcomes against the Trump administration. The article examines current economic performance and its political implications. Consumer-facing metrics like inflation will likely prove decisive in voter sentiment.
content: How much Donald Trump can do with the time he has left as president will depend massively on the cost of living.

zh.title: 选民将通过经济评判特朗普——经济状况如何?
zh.summary: 当选民为选举做准备时,经济状况,特别是生活成本,将对特朗普政府的选举结果产生重大影响。该文章审视了当前经济表现及其政治含义。消费者相关的指标(如通胀)可能会成为选民情绪的决定性因素。

title: Israel approves plan to buy F-35 and F-15IA fighter jets from Lockheed, Boeing
summary: Israel has approved a major defense procurement plan to purchase advanced F-35 and F-15IA fighter jets from U.S. contractors as part of a $119 billion military modernization strategy. The purchase reflects Israel's security concerns and deepens U.S.-Israel defense cooperation. The deal represents significant aerospace industry revenue and strategic military capability enhancement.
content: The deal is a first step in a $119 billion plan to bolster Israel's military

zh.title: 以色列批准从洛克希德·马丁和波音购买F-35和F-15IA战斗机计划
zh.summary: 以色列批准了一项主要防务采购计划,作为1190亿美元军事现代化战略的一部分,购买来自美国承包商的先进F-35和F-15IA战斗机。该购买反映了以色列的安全关切,并深化了美以防务合作。该协议代表航空航天工业的重大收入和战略军事能力增强。

title: Struggling High Streets fuel sense of neglect for voters ahead of local elections
summary: Declining UK High Streets are fueling voter discontent ahead of May local council elections, with deteriorating town centers symbolizing broader economic challenges and regional inequality. The deterioration reflects years of retail shifts and underinvestment in traditional commercial districts. Electoral results may reflect voter frustration with perceived government neglect.
content: Failing High Streets fuel a wider sense of political discontent which could prove crucial in the upcoming elections for English councils in May.

zh.title: 陷入困境的英国商业街加剧选民的被冷落感
zh.summary: 衰落的英国商业街正在加剧五月地方议会选举前选民的不满，日益衰退的商业中心象征着更广泛的经济困难和地区不平等。这种衰退反映了多年来零售业转变和对传统商业区投资不足的结果。选举结果可能反映选民对政府被认为的忽视的沮丧。

title: Golden Tempo wins Kentucky Derby as DeVaux breaks barrier in Louisville
summary: Golden Tempo won the 152nd Kentucky Derby at Churchill Downs on Saturday, with jockey DeVaux breaking a notable barrier. The victory marks a significant achievement in the historic horse racing event.
content: Golden Tempo stormed to victory at the 152nd running of the Kentucky Derby at Churchill Downs on Saturday.

zh.title: Golden Tempo赢得肯塔基德比，DeVaux在路易维尔创造历史
zh.summary: Golden Tempo在周六于丘吉尔草地赛马场赢得第152届肯塔基德比，骑手DeVaux创造了一个历史性的突破。这次胜利标志着这一历史悠久的赛马赛事中的重大成就。

title: 'Godspeed my friend': Inside the final hours of Spirit Airlines
summary: Spirit Airlines ceased operations overnight after failing to secure government bailout funding. The low-cost carrier's shutdown ends decades of service in the U.S. aviation market.
content: Spirit Airlines ceased operations overnight after a failed government bailout.

zh.title: "一路顺风我的朋友"：精神航空公司最后几小时内幕
zh.summary: 精神航空公司在未能获得政府救助资金后一夜之间停止运营。这家低成本航空公司的关闭结束了其在美国航空市场数十年的服务。

title: Trump says the U.S. will reduce number of troops in Germany 'a lot further' than withdrawal of 5,000
summary: Trump announced the U.S. will significantly reduce troop presence in Germany beyond the Pentagon's planned withdrawal of 5,000 soldiers. The statement signals a substantial shift in American military commitments in Europe.
content: The Pentagon had announced it would pull 5,000 troops out of Germany, but Trump said an even bigger reduction was coming.

zh.title: 特朗普称美国将比计划撤出5000名士兵"更大幅度地"减少驻德国军队
zh.summary: 特朗普宣布美国将在五角大楼计划撤出5000名士兵的基础上进一步大幅减少在德国的军事存在。这一声明表明美国在欧洲的军事承诺发生了重大转变。
